title: REVENANT
blurb: One android. One night. One signature that ends a life — or doesn't.

title: THE SEVENTH GUEST
blurb: Six guests. One drowned host. One empty chair with your name on it.

title: DRACULA'S GUEST
blurb: Walpurgis Night. A grieving woman in an iron-staked tomb. A wolf that will not let you freeze — or leave.
